span.p:
Data Import
JSON OpenBEP model or IFC4 Add2 DTV

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Data Validation
Schema, references, semantic constraints

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Data Transformation
Helpers prepare module-specific inputs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Simulation Core Modules
EN ISO 52016-1 hourly needs
EN ISO 6946/13370/13789 envelope
EN ISO 52010-1 climate
EN 16798-1 indoor/operation
EN 15316 and ISO 52031/52032 systems

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Orchestration Layer
Execution sequence + intermediate results

span.p:
EPC-relevant Outputs
Final energy by carrier
Primary energy
Operational GHG emissions
On-site RES share
